projects.name: OpenClimate
projects.description: Nested carbon accounting system with high verifiability to enable actions limiting global warming to 1.5C. Federated data commons incorporating subnational data into global commons.

projects.name: CityCatalyst
projects.description: Machine learning platform analysing satellite imagery for GHG emissions, empowering lower-resource cities to track and reduce greenhouse gas emissions.

projects.name: Planetary Guardians Protocol
projects.description: Ostrom-based regenerative governance protocol for landscape-scale ecological stewardship. Base unit is 10m2 pixel of land. Constitutional kernel frozen February 2026.

people.skills: Climate tech, blockchain, open data infrastructure, Paris Agreement tooling
people.notes: LinkedIn available. Leads OpenClimate and CityCatalyst projects.

people.skills: Meta-governance, urban climate adaptation, participatory design, Ostrom-based protocols
people.notes: Based in Denmark. Extensive research on urban renewal in Copenhagen, Aalborg, and Hammarby Sjostad (Stockholm). 20 working papers on Moral Biology, Planetary Guardianship, and Applied Protocols. FLAG: Nordic Connection.
